instructions.text: Choose the shortest note that keeps all key info

questions.sentence: The Amazon rainforest produces about twenty percent of Earth's oxygen

options.text: The Amazon rainforest in South America produces about twenty percent of the Earth's oxygen supply

questions.sentence: Water boils at 212 degrees Fahrenheit at sea level

options.text: The boiling point of water when measured at sea level is 212 degrees Fahrenheit

questions.sentence: The Great Wall of China stretches over 13000 miles

options.feedback: Excellent! All key info, super short

options.text: The Great Wall of China is a very long wall that stretches over 13000 miles
